# jamfschool_ibeacon (Data Source)

Use this data source to look up a Jamf School iBeacon by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "jamfschool_ibeacon" "example" {
  id = 42
}

output "ibeacon_uuid" {
  value = data.jamfschool_ibeacon.example.uuid
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) Unique identifier.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description.
- `major` (Number) Major value.
- `minor` (Number) Minor value.
- `name` (String) Name.
- `uuid` (String) iBeacon UUID.
